chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 257 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.12.2025. Applicant present in person. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State alongwith Muhammad Umar Memon, Mukhtiarkar Badin and ASI Preen PS Badin. = Mr. Fayaz Hussain Abro, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of private respondent, taken on record. It appears from the perusal of order passed by the learned Ex-Officio of Justice of Peace that the alleged incident is entirely of civil nature. The applicant present in person submits that there is no harassment and the matter is pertaining to land. He does not have any allegation of corruption or dishonesty against the government officials. Since the complaint filed by the complainant was in Sindhi language, this bench sought assistance of the learned A.P.G with regard to whether there was any information available in the said complaint that could potentially be agitated as a cognizable offence. To this end learned A.P.G identified paragraph-3 of the said application. However, the applicant submitted that no one threatened him. He confirms that the complaint in Sindhi language was prepared for him through a friend. Given the above reasons, I do not find any defect in the impugned order dated 24.03.2025 and this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is hereby dismissed. JUDGE Tufail
